creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #5)
> $ cd libimagequant

Forgot about subdirectory

  $ cd libimagequant/imagequant-sys

Otherwise, build would fail

  $ cargo cbuild                                                                                                                
  Error: CliError { error: Some(none of the selected packages contains these features: capi), exit_code: 101 }

I originally used lewton (doesn't use a subdirectory for capi) as example but switched to libimagequant as it's more popular and depends on fewer crates (faster build).
